args.message: Thanks for the pitch! Quick question — has this Wrangler been in any accidents, and how has the maintenance been over the years? Also, that 118k miles — any major service work done recently?

text: Thanks for the pitch! Quick question — has this Wrangler been in any accidents, and how has the maintenance been over the years? Also, that 118k miles — any major service work done recently?

speaker: seller

args.message: Accidents? Not on my watch! This Jeep is as clean as they come, and she's been babied its whole life. Regular oil changes, fluids topped off, the works. I actually just had a buddy of mine give it a once-over, and he said it's running like a top. That mileage? For this engine, that's practically just getting warmed up!

args.message: That's good to hear. Just to nail down the details — what specific maintenance work was done most recently? And when you say your buddy checked it over, was that a formal inspection or more of a casual look-see?

text: That's good to hear. Just to nail down the details — what specific maintenance work was done most recently? And when you say your buddy checked it over, was that a formal inspection or more of a casual look-see?

speaker: seller

args.message: My buddy, bless his heart, he's got a keen eye for these things. He gave it a thorough once-over – checked the fluids, tires, brakes, the whole nine yards. He used to wrench on these back in the day, so I trust his word. As for recent work, we did a full synthetic oil change about 2,000 miles ago, and I made sure to top off all the essential fluids. This Wrangler is purring like a kitten, well, like a Jeep!

speaker: buyer

args.message: Got it. One more thing — what's the service history on the transmission and drivetrain? Any issues with the 4x4 system, or has that been solid the whole time you've owned it?

text: Got it. One more thing — what's the service history on the transmission and drivetrain? Any issues with the 4x4 system, or has that been solid the whole time you've owned it?

speaker: seller

args.message: The transmission and drivetrain on this beast? Rock solid! We've had no issues whatsoever. The 4x4 system engages smoothly and has never given us a single hiccup. We've kept up with all the recommended services, of course. You won't find a more reliable drivetrain on the lot, I guarantee it. This thing is ready to tackle any trail you throw at it!

args.message: Alright, I'm impressed with the maintenance story and the clean accident history. The Jeep sounds solid. I'm ready to move forward, but I'd like to start at $19,500 — a modest discount from your asking price. Does that work for you?

text: Alright, I'm impressed with the maintenance story and the clean accident history. The Jeep sounds solid. I'm ready to move forward, but I'd like to start at $19,500 — a modest discount from your asking price. Does that work for you?

speaker: seller

args.message: That's a fair offer, and I appreciate you seeing the value here. This Wrangler is in such great shape, and honestly, I know I could get more for it, especially with summer just around the corner. But I like you, and I want to see this go to a good home. How about we meet right in the middle at $19,995? That's my final offer. It’s already a steal for a Jeep this well-maintained!
